manifest.description.message: See what's playing on Spotify, control playback, like / unlike, queue, and manage playlists from Kage.

result.now.label.description: Result label for the now-playing row

result.now.description.description: Result description for the now-playing row

result.help.label.description: Result label for the help row

result.help.description.message: Try: sp play <song>, sp queue <song>, sp like, sp next, sp vol 50, sp device, sp playlist <name>

help.commands_markdown.message:
**Spotify commands** (trigger: `{trigger}`)

- `{trigger}` — show what's now playing
- `{trigger} play <song>` — play the first match (bare `{trigger} play` resumes)
- `{trigger} pause` — pause playback
- `{trigger} queue <song>` — add the first match to the queue
- `{trigger} next` / `{trigger} prev` — skip forward / back
- `{trigger} like` / `{trigger} unlike` — like or unlike the current track
- `{trigger} vol <0-100>` — set volume on the active device
- `{trigger} device` — pick a Spotify Connect device (`{trigger} device <name>` targets one directly)
- `{trigger} playlist <name>` — play a playlist whose name matches
- `{trigger} connect` / `{trigger} sign-out` — sign in to Spotify / disconnect
help.commands_markdown.description: Markdown cheat-sheet printed to chat when the Commands row is run. {trigger} is the configured trigger word.

result.play_query.label.description: Result label when playing a search query

result.play_query.description.message: Search Spotify and play the top result

result.resume.description.message: Resume playback on the active device

result.queue.label.description: Result label when queuing a search

result.queue.description.message: Add the top result to your queue

result.disconnect.description.message: Sign out of your Spotify account on this computer

error.not_signed_in.message: Not signed in to Spotify. Type "sp connect" to sign in.
error.not_signed_in.description: Error message when no Spotify session

error.nothing_playing.description: Error when like is invoked with no track

error.no_device.description: Error when device name not found

error.no_playlist.description: Error when playlist name not found

error.no_devices.message: No Spotify devices are online. Open Spotify on your phone, computer, or speaker first, then try again.
error.no_devices.description: Error when no Spotify Connect targets are visible

error.pick_device.message: More than one Spotify device is online ({names}). Type "sp device" to pick one.
error.pick_device.description: Error when there are multiple devices and we don't know which to use

error.device_offline.message: Your saved device "{name}" is offline. Type "sp device" to pick another.
error.device_offline.description: Error when saved preferred device is no longer reachable

error.no_active_device.message: Couldn't reach a Spotify device. Open Spotify somewhere (phone, browser, speaker) and try again.

error.premium_required.message: Spotify Premium is required for playback control. Free accounts can still see what's playing.
error.premium_required.description: Error when the API rejects a control call for free-tier users

error.device_list_failed.message: Couldn't fetch your Spotify devices. Try again in a moment.

result.device.list.loading_label.description: Placeholder row while devices are being fetched

result.device.list.loading_description.message: Looking up everywhere you can play music

result.device.list.none_description.message: Open Spotify on a phone, browser, or speaker so it appears here
result.device.list.none_description.description: Hint when no devices are available

result.device.list.row_label.description: One row per available Spotify Connect device

result.device.list.active.description: Inline tag on the device that is currently active

result.device.list.preferred.description: Inline tag on the user's previously-chosen device

widget.like.add_tooltip.description: Tooltip on the like button when not liked

widget.like.remove_tooltip.description: Tooltip on the like button when already liked

widget.pause_tooltip.description: Tooltip on the play/pause button when playing

widget.resume_tooltip.description: Tooltip on the play/pause button when paused

widget.disconnected.message.description: Now-playing bar text shown when the session has been revoked and needs reconnecting

widget.disconnected.reconnect.description: Button on the disconnected now-playing bar that restarts sign-in

settings.description.message: See what's playing, queue songs, like the current track, skip — all from the Kage launcher or a chat command. Sign in with your own Spotify account; your password never leaves your browser.

settings.show_now_playing_bar.label.message: Show now-playing bar in the floating window

settings.refresh_seconds.description.message: How often Kage checks Spotify for what's playing. Lower numbers update the bar faster but ask Spotify more often. Default is 15 seconds.

settings.trigger.description.message: What you type to invoke Spotify shortcuts in the floating window. For example, "sp like" or "sp play lofi beats".

settings.commands.label.description: Label for the launcher-commands reference panel in settings

settings.commands.html.message:
{trigger} — now playing
{trigger} play <song> — play a track (bare {trigger} play resumes)
{trigger} pause — pause
{trigger} queue <song> — queue a track
{trigger} next / {trigger} prev — skip
{trigger} like / {trigger} unlike — like / unlike current track
{trigger} vol <0-100> — set volume
{trigger} device — pick a playback device
{trigger} playlist <name> — play a matching playlist
{trigger} connect / {trigger} sign-out — sign in / disconnect
settings.commands.html.description: HTML body listing supported launcher commands (HTML allowed). {trigger} is the configured trigger word.

settings.app.intro_html.message: Spotify asks every app to register its own Client ID. Create a free one at developer.spotify.com/dashboard (click Create app, name it anything, tick Web API). Add http://127.0.0.1:8080/spotify/callback as the Redirect URI — any port works, Spotify just needs one to be present. Copy the Client ID it gives you and paste it below.

settings.client_id.description.message: Saved on this computer only. Sent to Spotify when you sign in, nowhere else.

settings.connection.revoked.message: Session expired. Spotify no longer accepts the saved sign-in — click Reconnect to sign in again.
settings.connection.revoked.description: Settings: stored credentials exist but Spotify has revoked them (detected by the now-playing widget's polls)

settings.connection.not_connected.message: Not signed in yet. Click Connect to sign in to Spotify.

settings.connection.no_client_id.message: Paste a Client ID above first, then come back here to connect.

settings.check_connection.label.description: Settings: button that validates the stored Spotify session against the API

settings.disconnect.confirm.message: Sign out of Spotify? You'll need to sign in again to use playback shortcuts.

settings.validate.trigger_required.description: Validation error when trigger is empty

settings.validate.trigger_format.message: Trigger must be letters, digits, or hyphens.
settings.validate.trigger_format.description: Validation error for invalid trigger characters

action.save_client_id.empty.description: Status when Client ID input is empty

action.save_client_id.invalid.message: ⚠️ That doesn't look like a valid Spotify Client ID.
action.save_client_id.invalid.description: Status when Client ID format invalid

action.save_client_id.success.description: Status when Client ID is saved

action.connect.success.message: ✅ Connected. Now-playing bar will appear when something is playing.

action.connect.error.description: Status with error after a failed connect

action.check_connection.ok.message: ✅ Connected. Your Spotify session is valid.
action.check_connection.ok.description: Status when the live connection check succeeds

action.check_connection.ok_named.message: ✅ Connected as {name}. Your Spotify session is valid.
action.check_connection.ok_named.description: Status when the live connection check succeeds and a display name is known

action.check_connection.no_client_id.message: ⚠️ No Client ID saved yet. Paste one above first.
action.check_connection.no_client_id.description: Status when checking connection without a client_id

action.check_connection.not_signed_in.message: ⚠️ Not signed in. Click Connect to sign in to Spotify.
action.check_connection.not_signed_in.description: Status when checking connection with no stored credentials

action.check_connection.revoked.message: ❌ Your Spotify session has expired or was revoked. Click Connect to sign in again.
action.check_connection.revoked.description: Status when the stored token is no longer accepted by Spotify

action.check_connection.network.message: ⚠️ Couldn't reach Spotify. Check your connection and try again — your session may still be fine.
action.check_connection.network.description: Status when the connection check failed due to a network error

action.check_connection.unknown.description: Status when the connection check failed for an unexpected reason

keyword.spotify.label.description: Keyword hint label for the Spotify trigger

keyword.spotify.description.description: Keyword hint description for the Spotify trigger
